title: Charta
description:
An extensive card mod for Minecraft.
Made for Modfest 1.21
body: ![Mod Logo](https://i.imgur.com/DTg5ClG.png) An extensive card Mod for Minecraft ## Description Charta is a card mod for Minecraft that allows players to play card matches inside the game. It also provides all the tools for other modders to incorporate their own card games into Minecraft. ## Games As of 1.0, charta currently offers 3 games: Crazy Eights, Fun and Solitaire. All games contain in game tutorials, and try to respect their original rules. ## Decks To play a card game, you need a valid card deck. You can find many of them scattared across your world. (Villages and Dungeons) ![Decks](https://i.imgur.com/ML0FH9J.png) ## Tables To play a card game, you also need a valid card table. Card tables can be set up in 3x3, 4x3 and 5x3 formats, allowing matches with up to 8 players. Tables also come in a variety of wood types, and you can mix and match its cloths to make it truly your own. ## Matches Once your setup is complete, you can play fully working card game matches. Play against other players! Against other enemies! Or even against yourself. ## Other information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: [https://github.com/lucaargolo/charta](https://github.com/lucaargolo/charta) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @d4rkin You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
